member.name: T:TransactionReceipt
member.summary: The consensus result for a transaction, which might not be currently known, or may succeed or fail.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.TransactionId
member.summary: The transaction's ID

member.name: P:TransactionReceipt.Status
member.summary: Whether the transaction succeeded or failed (or is unknown).

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.ExchangeRate
member.summary: The exchange rate of Hbars to cents (USD).

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.NextExchangeRate
member.summary: Next exchange rate which will take effect when current rate expires

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.AccountId
member.summary: The account ID, if a new account was created.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.FileId
member.summary: The file ID, if a new file was created.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.ContractId
member.summary: The contract ID, if a new contract was created.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.TopicId
member.summary: The topic ID, if a new topic was created.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.TokenId
member.summary: The token ID, if a new token was created.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.TopicSequenceNumber
member.summary: Updated sequence number for a consensus service topic. Set for {@link TopicMessageSubmitTransaction}.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.TopicRunningHash
member.summary: Updated running hash for a consensus service topic. Set for {@link TopicMessageSubmitTransaction}.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.TotalSupply
member.summary: In the receipt of TokenMint, TokenWipe, TokenBurn, For fungible tokens - the current total supply of this token. For non fungible tokens - the total number of NFTs issued for a given tokenID

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.ScheduleId
member.summary: In the receipt of a ScheduleCreate, the id of the newly created Scheduled Entity

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.ScheduledTransactionId
member.summary: In the receipt of a ScheduleCreate or ScheduleSign that resolves to SUCCESS, the TransactionID that should be used to query for the receipt or record of the relevant scheduled transaction

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.Serials
member.summary: In the receipt of a TokenMint for tokens of type NonFungibleUnique, the serial numbers of the newly created NFTs

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.NodeId
member.summary:
In the receipt of a NodeCreate, NodeUpdate, NodeDelete, the id of the newly created node. An affected node identifier.
This value SHALL be set following a `createNode` transaction.
This value SHALL be set following a `updateNode` transaction.
This value SHALL be set following a `deleteNode` transaction.
This value SHALL NOT be set following any other transaction.

member.name: F:TransactionReceipt.Duplicates
member.summary: The receipts of processing all transactions with the given id, in consensus time order.
The receipts (if any) of all child transactions spawned by the transaction with the given top-level id, in consensus order. Always empty if the top-level status is UNKNOWN.

member.name: M:TransactionReceipt.FromProtobuf(Proto.TransactionReceipt,System.Collections.Generic.IList{TransactionReceipt},System.Collections.Generic.IList{TransactionReceipt},TransactionId)
member.summary: Create transaction receipt from protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionReceipt.FromProtobuf(Proto.TransactionReceipt)
member.summary: Create a transaction receipt from a protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionReceipt.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a transaction receipt from a byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:TransactionReceipt.ValidateStatus(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Validate the transaction status in the receipt.
member.param: Whether to perform transaction status validation
member.exception: when shouldValidate is true and the transaction status is not SUCCESS

member.name: M:TransactionReceipt.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Create the protobuf.

member.name: M:TransactionReceipt.ToBytes
member.summary: Create the byte array.
